query:
SELECT
                sm.user_id,
                sm.server_id,
                p.username,
                p.avatar_url,
                sm.nickname,
                sm.role as "role!",
                sm.joined_at
            FROM server_members sm
            INNER JOIN profiles p ON p.id = sm.user_id
            WHERE sm.server_id = $1
              AND ($2::timestamptz IS NULL OR sm.joined_at < $2)
            ORDER BY sm.joined_at DESC
            LIMIT $3
